div1.entryFree:
Empery == empire, 1) supreme dominion: ruling in large and ample e. o'er France, H5 I, 2, 226. strive for rule and e. Tit. I, 19. Tit. I, 19 Tit. I, 19
2) country subject to a prince's dominion: your right of birth, your e., your own, R3 III, 7, 136. a lady so fair, and fastened to an e. Cymb. I, 6, 120.
